rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 122px; height: 60px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; width: 120px; height: 60px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
